subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who speaketh with truth and summoneth all unto His Own Self, the All-Subduing over all the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ینطق بالحق و یدع الکل الی نفسه المهیمنه علی العالمین قد حضر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power of the Manifestation of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
